channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump closes out July Fourth with a speech and fireworks
item.description: After a day of extreme heat and canceled events, President Trump closes out America's 250th birthday with a long speech and a fireworks display.
item.content:encoded: After a day of extreme heat and canceled events, President Trump closes out America's 250th birthday with a long speech and a fireworks display.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: Reporter's Notebook: The disability rights protest that changed every bus ride
item.description: A 1978 protest by wheelchair users won a right many now take for granted: boarding a city bus. NPR's Joe Shapiro and Colorado Public Radio's Stephanie Wolf explain.
item.content:encoded: A 1978 protest by wheelchair users won a right many now take for granted: boarding a city bus. NPR's Joe Shapiro and Colorado Public Radio's Stephanie Wolf explain.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Shapiro

item.title: How Detroit reflects America
item.description: On Independence Day, NPR's Don Gonyea returns to the city where he started his career to reflect on the auto industry, the Great Migration and the people who built Detroit.
item.content:encoded: On Independence Day, NPR's Don Gonyea returns to the city where he started his career to reflect on the auto industry, the Great Migration and the people who built Detroit.
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: Detroit and Windsor, Canada share a summer tradition
item.description: Detroit and Windsor, Canada have shared a fireworks tradition for generations. At the start of summer, thousands of people still gather on both sides of the border to celebrate together.
item.content:encoded: Detroit and Windsor, Canada have shared a fireworks tradition for generations. At the start of summer, thousands of people still gather on both sides of the border to celebrate together.
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: In Mount Rushmore speech, Trump veers from U.S. exceptionalism to warnings about communism
item.description: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump addresses nation and fireworks light up National Mall after storm delay
item.description: President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots. 

(Image credit: Jose Luis Magana)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Parades canceled and events delayed as historic heat grips U.S. on Independence Day
item.description: Severe heat is forcing Independence Day event organizers across the country to change and even cancel festivities.
item.content:encoded: Severe heat is forcing Independence Day event organizers across the country to change and even cancel festivities.
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: Metro Atlanta's Venezuelan community rallies to send aid after devastating earthquakes
item.description: Atlanta's Venezuelan community, one of the largest in the U.S., is gathering aid for earthquake victims.
item.content:encoded: Atlanta's Venezuelan community, one of the largest in the U.S., is gathering aid for earthquake victims.
item.dc:creator: Lily Oppenheimer

item.title: Happy 250th birthday, America
item.description: President Trump spoke at Mount Rushmore Friday before returning to Washington, D.C., and the Independence Day festivities there.
item.content:encoded: President Trump spoke at Mount Rushmore Friday before returning to Washington, D.C., and the Independence Day festivities there.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: 2 Texas communities take different paths to recover from last year's devastating floods
item.description: Now a year since catastrophic flooding in neighboring parts of the Texas Hill Country, two communities have taken two very different paths to recovery.
item.content:encoded: Now a year since catastrophic flooding in neighboring parts of the Texas Hill Country, two communities have taken two very different paths to recovery.
item.dc:creator: David Martin Davies
